feat.name: Legendary Rider
feat.text: You and your mount move like one being, effortlessly reading each other’s signals and synchronizing even in the thick of battle. Whenever you’re riding your mount, you are quickened; you can use the extra action only to command your mount using the Command an Animal skill action.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
